findings.description: Eldar is established as dying first in the ditch by falling onto Hadji Murad's leg, but the Key Scene has Bata die first and Eldar die last with no leg-fall moment at all.
evidence_quotes: dies first in the ditch, falling onto his master's leg
Eldar goes down at the earth wall.

findings.description: Michael Vorontsov is shown at the frontier fort the night before with apparent foreknowledge that Hadji Murad is coming, yet later learns of the same defection as a total surprise via dispatch in Tiflis.
evidence_quotes: is summoned out by a servant, returns composed, calls for champagne, and reveals nothing
the Caucasus has produced a surprise: Hadji Murad has crossed to their side

findings.description: Eldar identifies the ridge rider in the Key Scene as Akhmet Khan himself, though Akhmet Khan is established dead and the treatment's own scene 45 identifies the same rider as his son.
evidence_quotes: It is Akhmet Khan. He rode at your stirrup once.
Akhmet Khan's son, the inherited feud made flesh, his father's debt riding on his face

findings.description: Hadji Murad produces his own gold repeater watch from his breast pocket in scene 23, despite the watch being established as Simon Vorontsov's, which he is shown declining as a gift in scene 26.
evidence_quotes: Hadji Murad draws a gold repeater watch from his breast pocket
Vorontsov slides the case across the table; Hadji Murad does not take it

findings.description: Yusuf's silver coin token is established as worn on a leather thong at Hadji Murad's throat, but the Key Scene has him instead produce it from his belt.
evidence_quotes: his hand finds the small leather thong at his throat
He works the small silver coin Yusuf gave him from his belt

findings.description: Hadji Murad sweeps Kirillov's bribe gold into his sleeve in scene 36, yet the same gold is described sitting untouched in a heap on the floor in scene 37.
evidence_quotes: Hadji Murad sweeps them into his sleeve in one motion
The gold he was paid sits untouched in a bright heap on the floor.

findings.description: A spy reports Yusuf moved to a new pit beyond Vedeno, but the summary and scene 44 both still place him in the pit beneath Vedeno with no reconciliation.
evidence_quotes: Yusuf has been moved deeper — Vedeno, then beyond, the pit already dug.
in the pit beneath Vedeno, Yusuf presses his ear to cold stone

findings.description: Hadji Murad demands a twenty-Cossack guard of honor as his condition for cooperating, but only five Cossacks appear as his escort on the ride during which he escapes.
evidence_quotes: a guard of honor of twenty chosen Cossacks
White Kabarda mare, five Cossack mounts flanking close.

findings.description: The summary frames Shamil as proactively seizing an already-present family after learning of the defection, while scene 32 says the family was intercepted while itself trying to reach the Russian line.
evidence_quotes: Shamil, learning of the defection, moves against the family.
Hadji Murad's wife, mother, and son Yusuf were intercepted before they reached the Russian line

findings.description: The breakout party departs with five horses, but the ditch stand explicitly establishes six men in the same party, leaving one man's mount unaccounted for.
evidence_quotes: Five horses in frost-burned scrub, breath steaming, girths tight.
Six men cut branches with daggers, throw earth onto a low bank

findings.description: Hadji Murad's present age minus his flashback age implies 22 years have passed, while Shamil's present age minus his flashback age implies only 17 years for the same remembered event.
evidence_quotes: HADJI MURAD AT TWENTY-FIVE.
SHAMIL (mid 50s; ~38 in flashback)

findings.description: In the Key Scene, Hadji Aga has already rolled Hadji Murad's severed head away with his foot, yet Hadji Murad's body still raises its hands and speaks his final line afterward.
evidence_quotes: Hadji Aga rolls the severed head away with the side of his foot.
Hadji Murad's palms try to draw down the beard. They fall. Allah knows.

findings.description: Bata's death differs in manner and timing between the treatment, where he dies of a throat wound amid the general firefight, and the Key Scene, where he is shot immediately while climbing the bank early as a decoy.
evidence_quotes: Bata sits hard in the dirt, throat ragged, spits red, goes still.
He climbs to the bank. A shot cracks. Bata pitches into the mud. Still.
